message: chore(beads): update bead descriptions with comprehensive specs and test plans

files.patch:
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-1ju","title":"Process ancestry chain display","description":"Purpose:
- Show full process tree path for spawned AI processes
- Enable understanding of multi-layer orchestration (shell → tmux → agent → claude)
- Critical for debugging and auditing agent swarms

User impact:
- 'rano --show-ancestry' displays: 'zsh(123) → tmux(456) → bash(789) → claude(1234)'
- Users understand exactly how AI processes were spawned
- Helps identify rogue or unexpected process spawning

Features:
- --show-ancestry flag: include ancestry in event output
- Ancestry format: 'parent_comm(pid) → ... → current_comm(pid)'
- Cache ancestry to avoid repeated /proc walks
- Store ancestry_path in SQLite for historical queries
- Report includes ancestry breakdown

Implementation approach:
- read_ancestry(pid) walks /proc/{pid}/stat PPID chain to init
- Cache: HashMap<pid, Vec<(pid, String)>> with TTL
- Ancestry invalidated if PID recycled (check comm matches)

Testing:
- Unit tests for ancestry chain parsing
- E2E script with nested process tree (shell → script → rano)
- Verify ancestry displayed correctly in output and stored in SQLite","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:02:18.765913116Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T11:04:31.933812417Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T11:04:31.933767403Z","close_reason":"All child tasks complete: ancestry chain reading (bd-vb7), CLI flag + SQLite storage (bd-15l), and tests + docs (bd-94z). Feature fully implemented with 21 unit tests and E2E coverage.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1ju","depends_on_id":"bd-3o1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:02:18.871921353Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1lq","title":"Colorblind-friendly themes","description":"Purpose:
- Make rano accessible to users with color vision deficiency
- ~8% of males have some form of color blindness

User impact:
- '--theme colorblind' uses patterns and symbols in addition to colors
- High-contrast palette visible to all users
- Equal usability regardless of color perception

Features:
- New theme: colorblind
- Use unicode markers: ● anthropic, ◆ openai, ▲ google, ○ unknown
- High-contrast palette: blue/orange/black (deuteranopia-friendly)
- Patterns in bar charts: █▓▒░ for differentiation
- Shapes before provider names in stats

Implementation:
- Add theme variants to existing Theme enum
- Map provider to (color, symbol) tuple
- Update format_* functions to include symbol when theme=colorblind

Testing:
- Unit tests for symbol mapping
- E2E script verifying symbols appear in output
- Visual comparison screenshots (docs)","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:07:15.507701965Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-22T03:05:59.809496537Z","closed_at":"2026-01-22T03:05:59.809454899Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1lq","depends_on_id":"bd-3o1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:07:15.536896755Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1o5","title":"Session diff between runs","description":"Purpose:
- Compare what changed between monitoring sessions
- Enable baseline comparison for security audits
- Detect new domains, removed endpoints, or changed patterns

User impact:
- 'rano diff --old <session1> --new <session2>' shows changes
- Auditors can baseline 'normal' and detect deviations
- Regression detection for AI client updates

Features:
- rano diff --old <run-id|session-name> --new <run-id|session-name>
- Output sections:
  - New domains: domains in new but not old
  - Removed domains: domains in old but not new
  - Changed counts: domains with >50% count change
  - New processes: process names that appeared
  - Provider shifts: significant count changes per provider
- --format pretty|json
- --threshold <percent> for 'significant' change (default 50)

Implementation:
- Query both sessions from SQLite
- Build sets/maps per domain, process, provider
- Compute diff and format

Testing:
- E2E script that creates two sessions with known differences
- Verify diff output shows expected changes
- Test empty diff (identical sessions)","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:07:25.791936234Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-22T03:12:33.255256740Z","closed_at":"2026-01-22T03:12:33.254738795Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1o5","depends_on_id":"bd-3o1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:07:25.822132831Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"bd-1qk","title":"Update all dependencies to latest stable versions","description":"Run cargo update (or bun update for TS) and verify build. Closed Dependabot PRs - doing updates independently via /library-updater.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-10T00:22:25.162854591Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T00:22:25.162854591Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"bd-1qk","title":"Update all dependencies to latest stable versions","description":"## Dependency Updates Required

Closed Dependabot PRs:
- 5 GH Actions updates (actions group)

## Steps
1. Run cargo update for Rust deps (opportunistic, even though no Rust dependabot PRs)
2. Run: cargo check --all-targets && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
3. Run: cargo test
4. Update GH Actions versions in .github/workflows/*.yml
5. Run: actionlint .github/workflows/*.yml

## Testing
- cargo test must pass
- CI must pass on push","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-10T00:22:25.162854591Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T01:20:46.478736870Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-1vz","title":"Export to common formats (CSV/JSONL)","description":"Purpose:
- Enable users to bring rano data into external tools (Excel, Pandas, grep, jq)
- Unlock SQLite data for analysis pipelines
- Replace need for manual sqlite3 queries

User impact:
- 'rano export --format csv > connections.csv' produces Excel-compatible output
- 'rano export --format jsonl | jq .domain' enables shell pipelines
- Data analysts can use familiar tools instead of learning SQLite views

Features:
- rano export --format csv|jsonl [filters]
- Filters: --since, --until, --run-id, --provider, --domain
- Output: streaming to stdout (pipeable)
- Fields: ts, run_id, event, provider, pid, comm, cmdline, proto, local, remote, domain, duration_ms
- CSV: header row, proper quoting, RFC 4180 compliant
- JSONL: one JSON object per line (reuses existing JSON formatting)

Constraints:
- Must handle large datasets without loading all into memory
- Must not require external dependencies (no csv crate)
- Field order must be stable (documented)

Testing:
- Unit tests for CSV quoting edge cases (commas, quotes, newlines)
- E2E script that exports, validates format, re-imports to verify roundtrip
- E2E must test empty result set, large result set, special characters","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:01:23.163975299Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T10:58:33.633478143Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T10:58:33.633432227Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1vz","depends_on_id":"bd-3o1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:01:23.193760593Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-20u","title":"Implement alert threshold checking","description":"Deliverables:
- AlertConfig struct with fields:
  - domain_patterns: Vec<String>
  - max_connections: Option<u64>
  - max_per_provider: Option<u64>
  - duration_threshold_ms: Option<u64>
  - alert_unknown_domain: bool
  - bell_on_alert: bool
  - cooldown_ms: u64

- check_alert() function called on each event
- AlertState struct tracking:
  - Last alert time per threshold type
  - Cooldown enforcement
  - Total alert count

- Integration points:
  - Call check_alert() after event detection
  - Return AlertResult { triggered: bool, alert_type: AlertType, message: String }

Implementation notes:
- Pattern matching: use glob crate for wildcards, regex for advanced
- Cooldown: HashMap<AlertType, Instant> for last trigger time
- Thread-safe if alerts need cross-thread state","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:37.468718314Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T08:21:16.751560546Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T08:21:16.751513828Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-20u","depends_on_id":"bd-1jj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:01:09.769903852Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-20u","depends_on_id":"bd-2iu","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:00:37.481921179Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-23q","title":"Preset tests and documentation","description":"Deliverables:
- Unit tests:
  - test_load_builtin_preset() - audit preset loads correctly
  - test_load_user_preset() - custom preset from disk
  - test_preset_not_found() - error for unknown preset
  - test_preset_override_by_cli() - CLI flags win over preset
  - test_multiple_presets_merge() - later preset overrides earlier
  - test_list_presets_includes_builtin() - all builtins listed

- E2E test script (tests/e2e/presets.sh):
  - Test each built-in preset runs without error
  - Create custom preset, verify it loads
  - Verify CLI flag overrides preset value
  - Test --list-presets output format
  - Log: preset content, effective config, actual behavior

- Documentation:
  - README section: 'Presets'
  - Table of built-in presets with descriptions
  - Example: creating custom preset
  - Troubleshooting: preset not found","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:05:58.076841992Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T11:15:36.249033974Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T11:15:36.248981866Z","close_reason":"Added 16 unit tests for presets. Created E2E test (scripts/e2e/presets.sh) with 11 tests. Added Presets section to README with built-in presets table, custom preset examples, merging docs, and troubleshooting.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-23q","depends_on_id":"bd-26d","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:05:58.096911567Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-23q","depends_on_id":"bd-3t7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:06:03.125194958Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
